required_acceptance.source_and_link_gate: ldx #$ff; txs; jmp _start, with no restart-branch jump through $fffc
required_acceptance.hardware_smoke_before_chain: receipt-less double restart-repl on the probe candidate
required_acceptance.authoritative_hardware: fresh full G5/G6 product-identity cycle; two consecutive public restart-repl calls in the permanent G6 case

outcome.direct_candidate: failed the receipt-less hardware pre-smoke: the product did not return to a fresh banner and prompt
outcome.recovery_candidate: closed before a valid product run: Bank 7 is outside the MEGA65's populated 384-KiB Fast-RAM range and read back as all zeroes
outcome.capacity_effect: none; neither candidate was promoted and all product-source changes were rolled back
outcome.authorization_effect: the three-byte authorization was conditional on a working direct candidate and therefore records no debit

decision: The owner-authorized direct candidate was admissible only after the new receipt-less pre-smoke. That smoke failed, so the debit is not booked. A later self-restart design requires a fresh probe, capacity attribution, and owner authorization.
